deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Lien resolved Apr 21. Closed Apr 27, 2026. Buyer military via Sam VanDenheuvel.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Thank you note to Chelsey Bongiovi. Post-close follow-up.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. All parties satisfied.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Delivered to Alyssa Castillo.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo re: lien holder. Willing to work with us.
Contract executed. $152,000 cash price.

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres
deals.notes: Land sale 20 acres, hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. Clearing complete. First offer (Michael Rodriguez) dead. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve once clearing wraps. Prepare for next offer with net-after-close framing.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked: Conex contents, camper, feeders.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. Drone footage prioritized for marketing.
First offer dead. No earnest money from Michael Rodriguez. RBFCU stalled.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank FSB property. Renovation in progress. Utilities being set up. Listing agreement needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application. Finalize listing agreement. Contact Priority Bank.

logs.m: Floor demo complete. Drywall cut for electrician and plumber. Utilities confirmed: Medina Electric and EMCSUD.
On-site visit with Bryce (dumpster contractor). Wife is active military VA buyer prospect.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met with Matt Toney. Connected directly with Jerry Sadler. Goal: work starts Monday.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan $489,501 payoff. Market value $350-400K. Underwater $93-143K before costs. Carrying ~$5,300/mo. Three paths: short sale, investor assumption, or bring cash to close.
deals.next: Call broker first. Then present three options to Matt and Chandler. Determine which path they can pursue.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis with three options. Commission negotiation offered.
Stopped by property. Landscaper referral received. Following up on lawn care.
Outside agent showing scheduled. Lawn care referral contacts made.
Market analysis complete. CMA shows realistic range $350-400K. Payoff ~$493K.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. 3BR/2.5BA. Listed May 14 at $259,900. First showing feedback received. Cultural concern noted. Insurance claim for roof moving forward.
deals.next: Monitor for offer. Roof/fascia decision pending with insurance adjuster. Follow up on additional showings.

logs.m: MLS live today. First showing feedback received from agent MK. Cultural concern about home direction. Roof update pending.
Insurance adjuster out May 11. Claim moving forward. New roof incoming.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.
Listing consultation with Isaac and sellers. Meeting went well. CMA recommended $259,900.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Sisters want to end listing. Isaac interested in mobile home development ~$150K offer. Title defect being corrected. Josh LT potential partner.
deals.next: Get attorney fee estimate from Van Hutchins. Confirm sisters willing to extend listing. Formalize Isaac offer once project details confirmed.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Isaac expanding concept to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Title defect confirmed. Deed missing Exhibits C and F. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed.
Sisters excited about Isaac development angle. ~$150K offer concept discussed.

deals.title: Colton Brown - Moore
deals.notes: 4.05 acres, 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft. Payoff $257K. CMA range $275-315K. Divorce situation. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles. Need updated payoff letter.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Schedule professional photos. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps. Built net sheet.
Prior clients from VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to finish and sell.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief-to-healing through plants story. Real estate potential long-term. Content collaboration angle: Healing Through Gardens.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story sharing. Keep nurturing relationship.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental property being sold. Landlord renovating duplex and raising rents. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA firm requirement. Open to rate buydowns and incentives.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach Schaphorst. Set up new construction home search platform. Identify builders with no HOA options.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 renovation project. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to buy in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info when on-site. Qualify wife for VA eligibility. Connect with VA lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: 13810 Tangle Tree St. Property 90% complete. Working with current realtor but having trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is. Community connection from garden event May 9.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. Position as fallback if current realtor doesn't work out.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor's Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor (deceased) owned home behind her. Son now owns property. Deceased was avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet - don't know his intentions.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out with empathy and neighborhood angle. Assess if selling, keeping, or renting.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property - unique situation. Caught up May 11, details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and fixer property specifications. Identify matching inventory.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - helped Brandon start in real estate. Working on Green Bliss rental listing (uncle Jimbo). Mother Milagros Stringer (210-378-5147) is new construction buyer. Grace Gardens strategy - rent 2 years then occupy.
leads.next: Get Milagros pre-approval confirmed. Send rental listing agreement to Jimbo. Set up new construction buyer rep agreement. Schedule Grace Gardens visit with both.

leads.title: Isaac Linares (Investor)
leads.detail: Investor and referral partner. Working on Borregas land development (mobile homes + veteran units). Referred Mill Path listing. Mobile home project timeline pending. Considering owner finance options.
leads.next: Confirm mobile home project timeline. Formalize Borregas ~$150K offer once details confirmed. Connect with Josh LT on project partnership.

leads.title: Kurt - Conbes Area
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes (currently under contract at $275K). Interested in local market intel and possibly his own property. CMA needed ASAP.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area (Priority #2 today). Determine if seller, buyer, or investor interest. Set up listing consultation if ready.

Confirm list price based on completion timeline

priorities.notes: Sellers underwater by $93-143K. Carrying $5,300+/month. Need broker guidance on short sale, investor assumption, or bring-cash paths. Then call Matt and Chandler with options.

Call Matt Gamez - present three path options, ask appetite level
If Path A: start short sale packet with Newrez

priorities.title: Colton Brown - Get Updated Payoff Letter
priorities.sub: Moore property 485 W FM 462 listing prep
priorities.notes: Payoff as of Feb 2026 was $255,578. Need current updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles. CMA complete, net sheet built.

Confirm acreage at property (impacts pricing significantly)

priorities.sub: 8527 Green Bliss rental + Milagros new construction buyer rep
priorities.notes: Jimbo answered all 12 questions on May 14 - rental terms confirmed at $1,595/month. Milagros buyer rep sent but not yet signed. Both need execution this week.

Follow up with Milagros on buyer rep signature - confirm pre-approval status with Zach
Get vinyl signs ordered - Home for Rent + branded sign

Monitor for additional showings and feedback
